title: cydonia vulgaris var. maliformis
intro: Cydonia vulgaris var. maliformis, also known as the Malus baccata or Siberian crabapple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The Malus baccata has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and boost the immune system. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting respiratory function. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
